markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review December performance and discuss new SEO/content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=357.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Local SEO Opportunity:** The Shop Directory gets high impressions for "near me" searches but has a low click-through rate (CTR). GrowthX proposed programmatic pages (e.g., "Best Dental Providers in \[City\]") to capture this traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**LLM Content Gap:** Sunbit is missing from 98 ChatGPT queries where competitor CareCredit appears. GrowthX will enrich \~39 existing articles to close this visibility gap.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [**Rebrand Context:** A full website rebrand is planned for mid-year (June/July). This context informs all SEO decisions, as some performance disruption is expected.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [**Workflow Bottleneck:** Content refreshes require compliance review. A new workflow is needed to scale updates without creating a bottleneck, a topic for discussion with Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

## Topics

### December Performance Review

  - [**Traffic:** Sessions outpaced November and nearly matched October, a strong result given the holiday period.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [**Keyword Rankings:** A raw Google Search Console export showed a decline in total keywords ranking (1,943 → 1,700 for top 10 positions).](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is not a red flag, as the decline is due to GSC's inclusion of irrelevant, long-tail keywords. Core keyword performance is stable.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility (Scrub):**](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
      - [**Competitor Gap:** Sunbit trails CareCredit significantly but is closing the gap with Cherry.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
      - [**Citation Gap:** Sunbit's citation rate is 2% vs. 9% for competitors combined, largely due to CareCredit's dominance.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

### Strategic Opportunities

  - [**Local SEO ("Near Me" Searches):**](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [**Problem:** The Shop Directory receives high impressions but has a low CTR for local queries like "auto repair shops near me."](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [**Proposed Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
        1.  [**Programmatic Pages:** Create template-based pages (e.g., "Best Dental Providers in \[City\]") to capture this traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
        2.  [**Partner Promotion:** Ask partners to mention Sunbit on their sites and Google My Business profiles to build credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [**LLM Content Gap:**](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [**Problem:** Sunbit is missing from 98 ChatGPT queries where CareCredit appears.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [**Action:** Enrich \~39 existing articles with these missing queries to improve visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [**Challenge:** This requires a compliance review for each update, creating a workflow bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)

### Process & Planning

  - [**Content Refresh Workflow:** A formal process is needed to handle content refreshes at scale while navigating compliance review.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Essential for maintaining performance and LLM visibility as content volume grows.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [**Sunbit AI Strategy:** An AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) strategy for the `sunbit.ai` domain will be presented before the end of January.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:** Send meeting recap to Angel and Jason via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [**Angel:** Discuss local SEO and LLM content update strategies with Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [**Angel & Vivek:** Schedule a follow-up with Jason to define a content refresh workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [Complete the audit of \~39 articles for LLM content enrichment by EOW Jan 16.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [Present the `sunbit.ai` AEO strategy before EOM Jan 31.](https://fathom.video/share/PqByCaym5CDz8THNxrar_M1U5gQnq_rq?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
